{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Jai clan mounts
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]]'s mounts are bats the size of horses with gray-white fur.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
